## ✨ Feature Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see. -->



---

## 🔍 Problem It Solves

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? What's the current pain point? -->
<!-- Example: "As a coordinator, I struggle to ___ because ___." -->



---

## 💡 Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as you can. -->



---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you thought of any other ways to solve the problem? -->



---

## 📸 Mockups / References

<!-- If you have UI mockups, wireframes, or links to similar features in other tools, share them here. -->



---

## 🧩 Where It Fits

<!-- Which part of the app does this affect? Check all that apply: -->

- [ ] IssueForm (submission modal)
- [ ] IssueList / IssueCard
- [ ] Map panel
- [ ] Volunteer matching engine
- [ ] Volunteer panel / cards
- [ ] Alert system
- [ ] Analytics / Charts
- [ ] AI classification
- [ ] Firebase / database
- [ ] Sidebar / navigation
- [ ] Deployment / hosting
- [ ] Testing
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

---

## ⚡ Priority / Impact

- [ ] 🔴 Critical — essential for core functionality
- [ ] 🟠 High — significantly improves the experience
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — nice to have
- [ ] 🟢 Low — minor improvement

---

## 👩‍💻 Would You Like to Implement This?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] I can help with testing or feedback
- [ ] No, just suggesting
